task: Write v7 squad landing page spec — microsoft.ai as design reference
what_worked: Admin's detailed analysis in the task file gave strong direction — didn't need to reverse-engineer microsoft.ai from scratch
Having clear 'what to DROP' and 'what to KEEP' lists made spec writing fast and decisive
Applied pat-001 lesson: included real reference site, explicit 'feeling' guidance, and clear what-not-to-do list
lesson: Well-structured handoff files with explicit drop/keep lists and design analysis dramatically speed up spec writing. The prep work Admin did was the real value.
